sources.title: AI Language Translator Tool Market Size, Share & Forecast 2025–2035
sources.claim: AI Language Translator Tool market valued at $9.49B in 2026, projected to $57.02B by 2035 at CAGR ~22%
sources.notes: Primary market sizing source. Defines 'AI Language Translator Tool' market broadly including real-time translation apps, APIs, and embedded translation engines.

sources.title: AI in Language Translation Global Market Report 2026
sources.claim: Market grows from $2.94B (2025) to $3.68B (2026) at CAGR 25.2%; narrower definition focused on software services
sources.notes: Secondary market sizing — narrower definition than Precedence Research. Used for 1Y growth_1y calculation (+25.2%). Range between $3.68B and $9.49B reflects different market scope definitions.

sources.title: AI in Language Translation Market — Size, CAGR 22.3%, Player Breakdown
sources.claim: AI in Language Translation market CAGR 22.3%; Google ~45% share, Microsoft ~18%, DeepL ~12%, Amazon ~8%
sources.notes: Used for market share breakdown (market.market section). CAGR consistent with Precedence Research range.

sources.title: Machine Translation Market — Size, Companies & Share
sources.claim: Machine translation market historical sizing and competitive landscape; growth trend from 2021 baseline
sources.notes: Used to estimate 5Y growth (growth_5y). Machine translation market was ~$1.8B in 2021; growing to $9.49B in 2026 = approximately +430% over 5 years.

sources.title: Ray-Ban Meta v11 Software Update — Live AI, Live Translation & Shazam Support
sources.claim: Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses support live real-time translation in English, French, Italian, and Spanish via Hey Meta voice command
sources.notes: Official Meta source confirming live translation feature and supported languages. Used in timeline (2024), jobs section, and canvas (where/why_now).

sources.title: Google's New Smart Glasses — For Travelers: Live Translation, Navigation
sources.claim: Google I/O 2026 reveals Gemini-powered smart glasses with real-time speech translation and live navigation; Warby Parker and Gentle Monster hardware partners
sources.notes: Travel-focused coverage of Google I/O 2026 announcement. Used for trigger, timeline (2026), and competitor profile (Google). Note: URL slug says 2025 but content covers May 2026 I/O reveal.

sources.title: AI Smart Glasses to Quadruple Revenue in 2026 as Apple and Samsung Prepare to Enter Market
sources.claim: AI smart glasses revenue quadruples from $1.2B to $5.6B in 2026; units from 6M to 20M; translation is lead hardware feature
sources.notes: Used for smart glasses market scale context and trigger. SAG is an independent analytics firm; figures consistent with CNBC and Memeburn reporting.

sources.title: International Tourism Statistics 2025
sources.claim: International tourist arrivals reached a record 1.6B+ in 2025, driving structural demand for ambient language translation tools
sources.notes: Used in PESTAL (Social) and Canvas (why_now). The 1.6B figure is consistent with UNWTO's recovery trajectory from 1.3B in 2023.

sources.title: Smart Glasses Market Size and Share Report, 2026–2033
sources.claim: Global smart glasses market $3.16B in 2026, projected to $14.38B by 2033 at CAGR 24.2%; Meta leads with 85% smart glasses share
sources.notes: Used for smart glasses market context and Meta market share figure. Consistent with Smart Analytics Global shipment data.

sources.title: Google Gives First Glimpse of New AI Glasses Ahead of Fall Launch
sources.claim: Google confirms fall 2026 launch for Gemini-powered smart glasses; reveals design and translation capabilities publicly for first time
sources.notes: CNBC primary source for Google glasses fall 2026 timeline confirmation. Used in trigger and competitor (Google) sections.

data_quality_notes.growth_5y: ESTIMATED — calculated backward from Mordor Intelligence baseline (~$1.8B in 2021) to Precedence Research 2026 figure ($9.49B). Market definition may not be perfectly consistent across years. Mark as [est.] in published report.
data_quality_notes.growth_1y: SOURCED — Business Research Company reports 25.2% CAGR, confirmed by market.us CAGR of 22.3%. Both support '+25%' directionally.
data_quality_notes.growth_3m: ESTIMATED — derived from annual CAGR of 22-25% divided by 4 quarters ≈ 6% per quarter. No direct Q-over-Q data available. Mark as [est.] in published report.
data_quality_notes.search_volume: ESTIMATED — ~80,000/mo is a composite estimate for 'AI translator' + 'real time translator' + 'AI translation' query cluster. Not verified with Keywords Everywhere tool. Mark as [unverified] in report.
data_quality_notes.market_share: Sourced from market.us player breakdown; top-5 totals ~88% which is directionally consistent with typical market research methodology. Remaining 12% spread across regional providers (Papago, Yandex Translate, iTranslate, etc.).
data_quality_notes.deepl_arr: DeepL's €1B+ ARR figure cited from multiple news sources (Sifted, EU-Startups); not officially disclosed. Treat as analyst estimate with confidence level ~70%.
